accurate.why: All claims match bill text: NIH field expansions, Centers of Excellence increase, reauthorization dates, appropriations, and reporting requirements.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details are supported by the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as reauthorizing and expanding ASD programs through FY2029.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Details specific amendments including expanded research fields, Centers of Excellence extension, language updates, and IACC changes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes specific conditions such as mandatory GPS monitoring and 'upon request' technical assistance.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states reauthorization through September 30, 2029 and report deadlines.

major_provisions_covered.why: Comprehensive coverage of all major bill sections including NIH, programs, IACC, reporting, appropriations, and technical assistance.

correct_entities.why: NIH, HHS, IACC, PHSA all correctly named.

correct_figures.why: $28.1 million, $56.344 million, and $306 million appropriations match bill text.
